name: votek
description: VoTek — voice-guided map tour. Monorepo: web/ (Vite+React front end) + server/ (Express/ws broker that serves the built web). The root orchestrates a one-command install/build/run so the app deploys with no extra config.

scripts.init: npm --prefix server install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix web install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix web run build
